title: marmaroxylon collinum
intro: Marmaroxylon collinum, also known as 'Guayacan', is a medicinal tree native to Central and South America. The bark and wood of this tree have been used for centuries due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Marmaroxylon collinum include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and infections, as well as the reduction of fever and the alleviation of pain. Herbal preparations of Marmaroxylon collinum include tinctures, teas, and salves made from the bark and wood, which can be used to promote healing and well-being.
